nasb.text: For no one who has a defect shall approach: a blind man, or a lame man, or he who has a disfigured face, or any deformed limb,

esv.text: For no one who has a blemish shall draw near, a man blind or lame, or one who has a mutilated face or a limb too long,

cnv.text: 因為有殘疾的，無論是瞎眼、瘸腿、五官不正、畸形、

ccb.text: 瞎眼的、跛脚的、五官不正的、畸形的、
